category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Eclipse Paho C client library for MQTT.
display_name_sources: Eclipse Paho official C client page uses the name MQTT C Client; source_facts.repo identifies the paho.mqtt.c project.
docs_sources: Official Eclipse Paho generated API docs and Eclipse Paho C client page document paho.mqtt.c.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/eclipse-paho/paho.mqtt.c, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an Eclipse Paho MQTT C client library; official Eclipse docs describe the MQTT C client APIs.
